subject: [PATCH v5 1/6] fuse: decouple fuse_ring creation from ent registration

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch decouples the creation of fuse_ring from entry registration in FUSE connections. The ring is now created during initialization after a server has negotiated and set FUSE_OVER_IO_URING, rather than being lazily created on the first FUSE_IO_URING_CMD_REGISTER command. This change eliminates concurrent creation races and simplifies the code by removing open-coded handling in fuse_uring_create().
